goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: 既存の第01工程が回答体験を所有し、true_false変換器は元問題全文と抽出記述を併記できる。安全な最初のsliceは、二者一致したspanだけをツールで切り出す契約、patch投影、新規派生ID、旧集約回答データの再利用防止を同時に実装すること。

worker_package.objective: 第01工程に、二者の構造化レビューを完全一致で照合し、原文spanだけから記述を切り出してtrue_false用patchへ投影する資格共通の中核を実装する。派生問題では既存Firestore IDと旧集約回答由来の正答・解説を再利用しない。
stop_if: Existing dirty changes overlap the selected files and ownership cannot be isolated.
The implementation would write or rename 00_source.
The extraction path would accept agent-authored text.
Verification fails twice for the same unresolved reason.
The existing converter cannot guarantee new document IDs for derived statements without changing files outside allowed_files.

evidence: config/question_maintenance_workflow.toml: question_type stage owns answer experience and currently updates questionType/isCalculationQuestion
scripts/fix/materialize_minimal_patch.py: current materializer copies source body and choices and is the correct tool-owned boundary
scripts/merge/patch_views.py: apply_question_type already projects choiceTextList and sourceUniqueKeys
scripts/convert/convert_merged_to_firestore.py: true_false already retains original body and appends exactly one extracted choice
scripts/convert/convert_merged_to_firestore.py: firestoreQuestionIds currently take precedence and must be cleared for semantic derivatives
scripts/merge/record_projection.py: legacy answer backfill must be disabled for decomposed aggregate-answer questions
scripts/check/check_questiontype_patch_coverage.py: current exact-choice check must become decomposition-aware and fail closed
pre-existing dirty files are limited to output/gas-shunin-* and do not overlap the Worker package
missing_evidence: Two independent agent-run orchestration is not implemented in this slice.
First-class health supervisor full trial and publication proof remain after the core slice.
required_board_updates: Activate T002 with the worker_package unchanged.
After T002, queue orchestration and full-trial work instead of final audit.
